title: Channel Manifest Schema
description: Formal definition of a Beast Evolution Game channel manifest. Channels are genetically regulated traits organized into families. They support mutation, composition, and emergent ability expression.

id.description: Unique identifier for this channel, in snake_case. Alphanumeric and underscore only, must start with letter or underscore.

family.description: Biological family of this channel. Determines typical mutation behavior, composition patterns, and expression logic.

description.description: Human-readable short description of what this channel represents (e.g., 'auditory perception threshold in dB', 'leg muscle fiber density').

min.description: Minimum valid value for this channel.

max.description: Maximum valid value for this channel.

range.description: Valid numeric range and physical units for this channel.

sigma.description: Standard deviation of Gaussian mutation kernel. Proportional to typical mutation step size; scaled by range width at runtime.

bounds_policy.description: How mutations hitting range boundaries are handled: clamp (truncate to boundary), reflect (bounce off boundary), wrap (periodic).

genesis_weight.description: Relative probability this channel is selected for duplication during channel genesis. Higher weight = more likely to be copied.

channel.description: ID of another channel to correlate mutations with.

coefficient.description: Pearson correlation coefficient (-1 to 1). Positive = codirection, negative = antagonistic direction, zero = no correlation.

correlation_with.description: Declares shared mutation directions with other channels, enabling coordinated evolution.

mutation_kernel.description: Gaussian mutation kernel parameters and correlation structure.

with.description: Channel ID to compose with, or 'self' for auto-interaction (e.g., squared term).

kind.description: Composition type: additive (sum), multiplicative (product), threshold (activation above value), gating (binary switch), antagonistic (subtraction).

coefficient.description: Weight or scaling factor for this composition operation.

threshold.description: Activation threshold value. Required when kind is 'threshold' or 'gating'.

items.description: How this channel combines with other channels or itself to influence phenotype or enable emergent abilities.

composition_hooks.description: Array of composition hooks defining interactions with other channels.

min_kg.description: Minimum body mass (kg) for this channel to express.

max_kg.description: Maximum body mass (kg) for this channel to express.

season.description: Season name when this channel expresses (e.g., 'spring', 'winter').

stage.description: Life stage when this channel expresses (e.g., 'juvenile', 'breeding_adult').

expression_conditions.description: Array of conditions (all must hold) under which this channel expresses. Empty array = always express.

min_kg.description: Minimum body mass (kg) for which this channel is relevant.

max_kg.description: Maximum body mass (kg) for which this channel is relevant.

scale_band.description: Applicable body mass range. Defines macro, meso, micro scales.

body_site_applicable.description: Whether this channel can have variant expression at different body locations (e.g., thick hide on back vs thin on belly).

provenance.description: Origin of this channel: 'core' (canonical), 'mod:<id>' (from mod), 'genesis:<parent_id>:<generation>' (duplicated and diverged).
